case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. APRIL PATTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2014 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,021.18 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT PATTON, APRIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.99) SERVED MAY-04-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATTON, APRIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATTON, APRIL $4,021.18 PRINCIPAL, $50.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,072.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-23-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL-COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $246.02 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF
